actions.summary: Designated for GameOver Zeus and CryptoLocker operations.

actions.targets: Evil Corp: Maksim Yakubets, Igor Turashev + 15 individuals, 7 entities
actions.summary: Evil Corp designated; Yakubets and Turashev indicted (W.D. Pa., D. Neb.); $5M reward for Yakubets.
First ever designation of a crypto exchange for laundering ransomware proceeds.

actions.targets: Chatex; REvil: Yaroslav Vasinskyi, Yevgeniy Polyanin
actions.summary: Chatex designated; Vasinskyi and Polyanin charged over Kaseya attack; Polyanin also designated; $6.1M seized.
Hydra darknet market designated and servers seized in Germany; Garantex designated for laundering over $100M including ransomware proceeds.
actions.outcome: Hydra dismantled; Garantex designated but continued operating in Russia

actions.summary: LockBit affiliate arrested in Ontario; charged in D.N.J.
Hive network infiltrated for months; decryption keys passed to victims; sites seized.

actions.targets: 7 Trickbot members incl. Mikhail Mikhailov, Mikhail Tsarev
actions.summary: First joint US/UK cyber sanctions action, targeting Trickbot/Conti members.
Charged in D.N.J. and D.D.C. over LockBit, Hive, Babuk attacks; designated same day; $10M reward.
LockBit affiliate arrested in Arizona.
Qakbot (key ransomware delivery botnet) dismantled; $8.6M crypto seized.

actions.targets: 11 more Trickbot/Conti members incl. Maksim Galochkin
actions.summary: Second joint US/UK Trickbot/Conti tranche.
Leak site seized, decryptor distributed to 500+ victims; group unseized site and later exit-scammed (Mar 2024, Change Healthcare).
actions.outcome: Group defunct via exit scam Mar 2024

actions.summary: Trilateral designation over Medibank breach (REvil-linked); first use of AU autonomous cyber sanctions.
actions.outcome: Sanctioned; later detained in Russia (SugarLocker case)

actions.targets: LockBit platform; Artur Sungatov, Ivan Kondratyev designated
actions.summary: 34+ servers seized, 200+ crypto accounts frozen, 1,000+ decryption keys recovered; 2 arrests (Poland, Ukraine); OFAC designated Sungatov and Kondratyev; DOJ indictments unsealed.
actions.outcome: Platform seized; core actors at large

actions.summary: REvil affiliate sentenced for Kaseya attack: 13 years 7 months + $16M restitution.
LockBit administrator unmasked, designated by US/UK/AU, indicted in D.N.J. (26 counts); $10M RFJ reward.
Black Basta leader arrested in Yerevan on US request; released after ~3 days and fled to Russia.
Both pleaded guilty to LockBit charges; sentencing was set for Jan 8, 2025; outcomes not publicly reported.
actions.outcome: Convicted by plea; sentencing outcome unreported

actions.summary: Bitzlato founder sentenced to time served (~18 months) after guilty plea; $23M forfeiture.

actions.targets: Cryptex, PM2BTC, Sergey Ivanov, Timur Shakhmametov
actions.summary: Cryptex and Ivanov designated; PM2BTC hit with FinCEN 311 finding; EDVA indictments (UAPS, $1.15B laundered); domains seized with Dutch FIOD; $10M rewards.
actions.outcome: Ivanov later arrested in Russia; Shakhmametov at large

actions.targets: Evil Corp expansion: Aleksandr Ryzhenkov, Eduard Benderskiy, Viktor Yakubets + 4 more
actions.summary: Trilateral expansion of Evil Corp designations; Ryzhenkov also charged (LockBit affiliate); FSB link via Benderskiy documented.
148 searches across 14 regions; Cryptex founder Ivanov among detainees; rare large-scale domestic action.

actions.targets: REvil: Artem Zayets (4.5y), Alexei Malozemov (5y), Ruslan Khansvyarov (5.5y), Daniil Puzyrevsky (6y)
actions.summary: First REvil verdicts from Jan 2022 FSB arrests; payment-means and malware charges.
Phobos ransomware administrator extradited from South Korea to D. Maryland.
LockBit developer arrested in Israel on US warrant (announced Dec 2024).
Charged in Russia under Art. 273 (malware creation); Matveev later claimed fines paid and release on bail; no official verdict published.
actions.outcome: Russian case outcome unconfirmed; US fugitive

actions.targets: Blender.io / Sinbad.io: Roman Ostapenko, Alexander Oleynik, Anton Tarasov
actions.summary: Mixer operators charged with laundering for ransomware gangs and DPRK; Ostapenko and Oleynik arrested Dec 2024; Tarasov at large.

actions.authority: Europol + Thailand + DOJ (D. Md.) + Bavarian LKA
actions.targets: Phobos/8Base: Roman Berezhnoy, Egor Glebov + 2 others
actions.summary: 4 Russians arrested in Phuket; 8Base leak site and 27 servers seized; US 11-count indictment; ~$16M extorted from 1,000+ victims.
actions.outcome: In Thai custody; US extradition unresolved publicly

actions.summary: Trilateral designation of LockBit hosting provider and two admins.
127 servers seized in Amsterdam after 2-year investigation.

actions.authority: USSS + DOJ (EDVA) + Europol + BKA + Finland + Netherlands + Estonia
actions.targets: Garantex; Aleksej Besciokov, Aleksandr Mira Serda
actions.summary: Domains and servers seized (Germany, Finland); >$26M frozen by US; Tether froze ~$28M; EDVA indictments unsealed (money laundering, IEEPA, unlicensed transmitting; ~$96B processed).
actions.outcome: Exchange taken down; successor Grinex emerged within weeks

actions.summary: Garantex technical admin arrested while on vacation in Varkala; US extradition proceedings began.
actions.outcome: Arrested (India); extradition to US not confirmed as of Jul 2026

actions.summary: LockBit developer extradited to US; 41-count superseding indictment.
At least 5 detained across Europe/North America, identified from database seized in May 2024 Endgame takedown.

actions.targets: Aeza Group leadership: Arsenii Penzev, Yurii Bozoyan + employees
actions.summary: Arrested in Russia over hosting BlackSprut darknet market (organizing criminal community charges).
actions.outcome: In Russian pretrial detention; no verdict as of Jul 2026

actions.summary: Nefilim affiliate extradited from Spain.
Panel defaced; ~60k BTC addresses and negotiation chats leaked; never attributed to law enforcement.
No-KYC swap service seized (announced May 9, action Apr 30); €34M in crypto and 8TB of data secured; ~$1.9B laundered incl. ransomware proceeds.

actions.authority: EU Council (17th package, hybrid threats regime)
actions.targets: Stark Industries Solutions; Iurie Neculiti, Ivan Neculiti
actions.summary: EU asset freezes and travel bans for enabling Russian hybrid operations, DDoS and malware hosting; firm pre-emptively migrated assets and rebranded (the.hosting).

actions.authority: DOJ + FBI + Microsoft DCU + Europol EC3 + JC3
actions.summary: 5 control panel domains seized; Microsoft blocked ~2,300 domains; ~394,000 infected machines identified.

actions.targets: DanaBot, Bumblebee, Latrodectus, Qakbot, Trickbot, WarmCookie, Hijackloader
actions.summary: ~300 servers down, ~650 domains seized, €3.5M crypto seized; 16 indicted for DanaBot (C.D. Cal.); Qakbot leader Rustam Gallyamov indicted ($24M forfeiture); BKA publicly identified Trickbot leader Stern as Vitaly Kovalev; ~20 added to EU Most Wanted.
actions.outcome: Infrastructure dismantled; suspects at large in Russia

actions.targets: REvil: Andrei Bessonov, Mikhail Golovachuk, Roman Muromsky, Dmitry Korotayev
actions.summary: 5-year sentences but released for time served in pretrial detention; ~$1.16M cash and cars seized.
Ryuk initial access specialist extradited from Ukraine; tied to 2,400+ attacks and ~$15M in ransoms; pleaded not guilty; trial set Aug 2025, outcome unreported.
actions.outcome: In US custody; trial outcome unreported

actions.targets: Aeza Group + 3 affiliates; Arsenii Penzev, Yurii Bozoyan, Vladimir Gast, Igor Knyazev
actions.summary: BPH designated for hosting BianLian ransomware, Meduza/Lumma/RedLine infostealers, BlackSprut; TRON payment address blocked.
actions.outcome: Entity designated; 2 leaders already in Russian detention

actions.targets: 4 suspects (M&S, Co-op, Harrods attacks; DragonForce deployed)
actions.summary: Scattered Spider-linked arrests in West Midlands and London: Computer Misuse Act, blackmail, money laundering.
Admin of main Russian-language cybercrime forum arrested in Kyiv; forum seized; ~$8.2M facilitation fees over ~20 years.

actions.authority: DOJ + ICE-HSI + FBI + USSS + Europol + NCA (7+ countries)
actions.summary: 4 servers and 9 domains seized incl. leak and negotiation sites; $1,091,453 in crypto seized; group assessed to partially re-form as Chaos.
Karakurt (Conti-linked) negotiator sentenced to 8.5 years ($56M scheme).

actions.targets: Garantex (re-designated), Grinex, A7 LLC network, Old Vector (A7A5 token), InDeFi, Exved; Sergey Mendeleev, Aleksandr Mira Serda, Pavel Karavatskii
actions.summary: Successor exchange Grinex and A7A5 ruble stablecoin ecosystem designated; Garantex processed $100M+ for ransomware actors; Grinex moved ~$9.3B in 4 months.
actions.outcome: Network designated; Grinex continued until Apr 2026

actions.summary: Zeppelin operator charged (computer fraud, money laundering via ChipMixer); $2.8M crypto seized.

actions.targets: Grinex LLC, CJSC Tengricoin (Meer exchange), Old Vector, Capital Bank of Central Asia, Altair Holding; Leonid Shumakov, Zhanyshbek Uulu Nazarbek, Kantemir Chalbayev
actions.summary: UK action against Garantex successor network and Kyrgyz A7A5 rails (~$9.3B moved).
Scattered Spider member sentenced to 10 years + $13M restitution.
Scattered Spider members charged over TfL attack (~£39M damage); US complaint ties Jubair to 120+ intrusions and $115M in ransoms.

actions.targets: A7A5 stablecoin (full ban), Grinex, Old Vector, Payeer
actions.summary: First-ever EU crypto-asset transaction ban (A7A5); crypto measures effective Nov 25, 2025.
Conti member extradited from Ireland (wire fraud conspiracy).
1,025 servers down, 20 domains seized; main VenomRAT suspect arrested in Greece; 525,303 Rhadamanthys infections identified.

actions.targets: Media Land LLC + 3 sister companies; Aleksandr Volosovik (Yalishanda), Kirill Zatolokin, Yulia Pankova; Aeza evasion network: Hypercore Ltd, Maksim Makarov, Ilya Zakirov, Smart Digital Ideas (Serbia), Datavice (Uzbekistan); UK also listed Andrei Kozlov
actions.summary: Trilateral-coordinated package against BPH serving LockBit, BlackSuit, Play, Evil Corp, Black Basta; plus Aeza sanctions-evasion vehicles.

actions.targets: Media Land LLC, ML.Cloud, Aleksandr Volosovik, Kirill Zatolokin
actions.summary: Fifth activation of Australia's autonomous cyber sanctions framework (Pankova not listed by AU).
Nefilim affiliate pleaded guilty; sentencing set May 6, 2026 (outcome unreported).

actions.targets: Black Basta: Oleg Nefedov (Tramp) + 2 Ukraine-based members
actions.summary: Nefedov added to EU Most Wanted and INTERPOL Red Notice; homes of two Ukrainian hash crackers searched (Lviv, Ivano-Frankivsk); ~600 victims worldwide, 100+ German firms.
Conti member pleaded guilty to wire fraud conspiracy; sentencing Sept 10, 2026.
Phobos administrator pleaded guilty to wire fraud conspiracy; forfeits $1.77M; sentencing July 15, 2026.
Initial access broker (chubaka.kor) sentenced to 81 months; $9M+ losses across victim companies.
~$13.7M drained; Grinex suspended operations blaming Western intelligence; no agency claimed the action.
Scattered Spider ringleader pleaded guilty (wire fraud conspiracy, aggravated identity theft); sentencing Aug 21, 2026.

actions.targets: Ryan Goldberg, Kevin Martin sentenced; Angelo Martino pleaded guilty Apr 20
actions.summary: US incident-response and negotiation insiders who moonlighted as ALPHV/BlackCat affiliates; Martino sentencing July 9, 2026.

actions.targets: CJSC TengriCoin (Meer.kg), RUBx stablecoin, digital ruble; full ban on all Russia/Belarus-based crypto service providers
actions.summary: Sweeping ban on transactions with all RU/BY crypto providers (effective May 24, 2026); dismantles post-Garantex evasion architecture.
Affiliate sentenced to 102 months (May 2026).

actions.targets: HTX (Huobi Global), Exmo Exchange Ltd, Rapira Group, Bitpapa IC FZC, Nueva Cryptologia (ABCEX alias), Eurasian Savings Bank + 8 more entities; Sergey Mendeleev, Igor Gorin, Liran Cohen, Irina Akopyan
actions.summary: First UK use of Regulation 17A against cryptoasset exchanges; first UK designation of a major global exchange (HTX, accused of channeling $1.5B+ to Russia); A7 network claimed to move ~$90B.
No ransomware, exchange or BPH targets among removals; noted to confirm all ecosystem listings remain in force.

actions.targets: AudiA6 laundering service; Ruslan Tkachuk, Alexander Ledenev
actions.summary: Crypto cash-out service for ransomware actors dismantled; two admins arrested in Georgia; ~10,333 BTC (~$389M) processed since 2021; US seeking extradition.
326 servers down, 142 domains seized; €41M criminal crypto frozen; 27M stolen credentials recovered.
Pleaded guilty on day 1 of trial (TfL attack); Flowers also admitted US healthcare intrusions; awaiting UK sentencing; Jubair faces outstanding US charges.
Scattered Spider suspect extradited from Finland; detained pending trial (~$8M extortion attempt, 100+ intrusions).
Phobos administrator Ptitsyn (derxan/zimmermanx), arrested in South Korea June 2024, extradited to the US; 13-count indictment unsealed in the District of Maryland.
actions.outcome: In US custody; later pleaded guilty

actions.authority: Europol + Eurojust + 14 countries (Bavarian LKA site seizure)
actions.targets: 8Base / Phobos network: leak and negotiation sites, 27 servers (100+ Phobos-linked cited by US), 4 arrests in Phuket
actions.summary: Darknet leak and negotiation sites seized; Roman Berezhnoy and Egor Glebov arrested in Phuket and charged in an 11-count D. Md. indictment; two additional arrestees undisclosed; 400+ companies warned.
actions.outcome: Sites dormant under LE banner; no reemergence confirmed

actions.summary: Ptitsyn pleaded guilty to wire fraud conspiracy tied to a Phobos operation with 1,000+ victims and ~$39M extorted ecosystem-wide.
